channel.title: Ai-Agents on Multi-Agent Future
channel.description: Recent content in Ai-Agents on Multi-Agent Future

item.title: How AI Is Flattening the Org Chart and Rewriting Middle Management
item.description: Gartner predicts 20% of companies will use AI to cut half their middle managers by 2026. Here's what's actually happening, who's doing it, and how to prepare.

item.title: How Multi-Agent AI Is Replacing $200/Hour Legal Associates in Document Review
item.description: Law firms spend 60-80% of litigation budgets on document review. Multi-agent AI systems are cutting that by 90% while improving accuracy. Here's exactly how it works, with implementation prompts.

item.title: I Lost 40% of My Savings on Emotional Trades. So I Built an AI Agent to Trade For Me.
item.description: After a devastating 4AM liquidation, I decided to remove myself from the trading loop entirely. This is Part 1 of how I built OWUW Beat — an autonomous BTC trading system powered by AI agents.

item.title: OpenClaw + Telegram + Binance: The Stack Behind My AI Trading Agent
item.description: Why I chose OpenClaw as the agent framework, Telegram as the interface, and Binance as the execution layer — plus the setup gotchas nobody warns you about.

item.title: Daily Trading Log — March 7, 2026 (Saturday)
item.description: Full company daily log covering OWUW Beat (BTC) bear market positioning, BlackJyong board automation launch, satellite watchlist bugs, and weekend operations across all agents.

item.title: Daily Trading Log — March 6, 2026 (Friday)
item.description: Full company daily log covering OWUW Beat (BTC), BlackJyong/OWUW Stock (equities), R&D research, satellite universe launch, agent collaboration, and multi-agent operations.

item.title: I Wrote a 250-Page Book in 6 Days Using AI Agents
item.description: How I used OpenClaw, Claude, and a team of six AI sub-agents to write a full-length book about AI automation — and what I learned about the future of creative work.

item.title: AI Agents in Clinical Trials: From White Space to Warp Speed
item.description: How agentic AI is cutting clinical trial timelines, automating CRA workflows, and reshaping drug development from recruitment to database lock.

item.title: Vertical AI Agents: The Solo Founder's Best Shot at a $1M Business
item.description: Why vertical AI agents are the most asymmetric startup opportunity for solo founders in 2026, with specific niches, revenue models, and execution prompts.

item.title: Daily Trading Log — March 4, 2026 (Wednesday)
item.description: Full company daily log covering OWUW Beat (BTC), BlackJyong/OWUW Stock (equities), R&D research, agent collaboration, and multi-agent operations.
